summary.intent: Fix three edge-case bugs in the ars-components timer component found by Codex's third review pass: zero-length interval causing non-terminating timer, stale props not synced into Context on prop changes, and zero-duration countdown not completing immediately.
summary.outcome: All three fixes implemented in timer/mod.rs with 6 new tests (56 total passing), spec updated to match new behavior, xci-fast passed, and changes committed and pushed.

repo: Timer component uses a state machine pattern with explicit Event variants; adding new behavior requires adding a new event (SyncProps) to the enum and a matching arm in transition()
The project has a spec directory at spec/components/specialized/timer.md that must be kept in sync with implementation changes
CRAP baseline tolerates newly-added functions as 'new' — only existing functions trigger CRAP gate failures
The project uses xci-fast as a pre-push CI gate before pushing to remote

code.finding: set_props did not override on_props_changed, so target/interval/mode changes were never synced into Context — transitions used stale values. Fix added SyncProps event and on_props_changed override.
effective_interval helper uses is_zero() check (not <= threshold) to clamp only exact zero intervals — avoids clamping very small but valid durations.
Zero-duration countdown must complete immediately in both init and Restart paths — requires an instant-complete state branch, not just skipping the timer spawn.

workflow: Codex review passes are iterative — each pass can surface new findings not caught in prior passes; budget for multiple rounds
Build verification after each logical edit group (not just at the end) catches compile errors early before tests are added
Spec files must be updated in the same commit as implementation to keep spec gates green

friction: Multiple read/locate passes were needed to find the correct insertion point for helper functions, suggesting the file is large and lacks obvious landmark comments
The spec's transition signature had a stale _props parameter that required a separate cleanup edit after the main spec update
open_items: Coverage CI was still running when the session ended — final coverage/CRAP gate result not confirmed in transcript
Codex re-trigger after pass-3 push was planned but not shown as completed in the transcript
